metadata.title: Atlas of Australian Languages — located languages
metadata.note: Only languages with a real (Glottolog) or approximate (AUSTLANG / derived-subgroup-centroid) coordinate are plotted; each carries coord_provenance + coord_approximate. 171 genuine languoids have NO located point and are deliberately omitted from this GeoJSON (they remain in languages.csv with coord_provenance=none) — never given a fabricated point.
